targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id = f.scan_id WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR f.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND (CASE WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'kubescape' THEN s.tool_name = 'kubescape' WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'trivy' THEN (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s') ELSE (s.tool_name = 'kubescape' OR (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s')) END) AND f.severity = 'critical' AND f.status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id = f.scan_id WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR f.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND (CASE WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'kubescape' THEN s.tool_name = 'kubescape' WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'trivy' THEN (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s') ELSE (s.tool_name = 'kubescape' OR (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s')) END) AND f.severity = 'high' AND f.status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.raw_data->>'k8s_resource_name') AS value FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id = f.scan_id WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR f.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND (CASE WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'kubescape' THEN s.tool_name = 'kubescape' WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'trivy' THEN (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s') ELSE (s.tool_name = 'kubescape' OR (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s')) END) AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.raw_data->>'k8s_namespace') AS value FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id = f.scan_id WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR f.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND (CASE WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'kubescape' THEN s.tool_name = 'kubescape' WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'trivy' THEN (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s') ELSE (s.tool_name = 'kubescape' OR (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s')) END) AND f.raw_data->>'k8s_namespace' != '' AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(f.raw_data->>'controlID', f.raw_data->>'ID')) AS value FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id = f.scan_id WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR f.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND (CASE WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'kubescape' THEN s.tool_name = 'kubescape' WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'trivy' THEN (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s') ELSE (s.tool_name = 'kubescape' OR (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s')) END) AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id = f.scan_id WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR f.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND (CASE WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'kubescape' THEN s.tool_name = 'kubescape' WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'trivy' THEN (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s') ELSE (s.tool_name = 'kubescape' OR (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s')) END) AND f.status IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(f.raw_data->>'k8s_namespace',''), 'cluster-wide') AS namespace, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.severity = 'critical') AS critical, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.severity = 'high') AS high, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.severity = 'medium') AS medium, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.severity = 'low') AS low FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id = f.scan_id WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR f.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND (CASE WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'kubescape' THEN s.tool_name = 'kubescape' WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'trivy' THEN (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s') ELSE (s.tool_name = 'kubescape' OR (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s')) END) AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT f.raw_data->>'k8s_resource_kind' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id = f.scan_id WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR f.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND (CASE WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'kubescape' THEN s.tool_name = 'kubescape' WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'trivy' THEN (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s') ELSE (s.tool_name = 'kubescape' OR (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s')) END) AND f.raw_data->>'k8s_resource_kind' IS NOT NULL AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT f.raw_data->>'k8s_resource_kind' AS kind, f.raw_data->>'k8s_resource_name' AS name, COALESCE(NULLIF(f.raw_data->>'k8s_namespace',''), 'cluster-wide') AS namespace, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.severity = 'critical') AS critical, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.severity = 'high') AS high, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.severity = 'medium') AS medium, COUNT(*) AS total FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id = f.scan_id WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR f.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND (CASE WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'kubescape' THEN s.tool_name = 'kubescape' WHEN '${tool:raw}' = 'trivy' THEN (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s') ELSE (s.tool_name = 'kubescape' OR (s.tool_name = 'trivy' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'k8s')) END) AND f.raw_data->>'k8s_resource_kind' IS NOT NULL AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST) GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY critical DESC, high DESC, total DESC LIMIT 20

list.definition: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM projects ORDER BY name
list.label: Project
list.name: project
list.query: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM projects ORDER BY name
